revision.comment: Adding unknown parameter tracking through [[:Category:Pages using image frame with unknown parameters]] using [[Module:check for unknown parameters]]. Not limiting to article space after finding malformed Template:Thumb at [[Wikipedia:Gadget/proposals/Archive 3]], possibly due to a bad template merge.
revision.text:
{{#switch: {{{align|}}} | center | centre=
}}
{{#ifeq: {{{pos|}}} | top |
{{#if: {{{link|}}} | {{align|right|{{{linkoverride|[[File:Desc-i.svg|16px|link={{{link}}}{{#if: {{{link_text|}}} | {{!}}{{{link_text}}}}}]]}}}}} |}}{{{caption|}}}
|}}
{{#ifeq: {{{mode|}}} | scrollable|
}} {{{content}}}{{#ifeq: {{{mode|}}} | scrollable|
}}
{{#ifeq: {{{pos|}}} | top || {{#if:{{{caption|}}}|
{{#if: {{{link|}}} | {{align|right|{{{linkoverride|[[File:Desc-i.svg|16px|link={{{link}}}{{#if: {{{link_text|}}} | {{!}}{{{link_text}}}}}]]}}}}} }}{{{caption|}}}
}} }}
{{#switch: {{{align|}}} | center | centre=
}}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown=[[Category:Pages using image frame with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]|preview=Page using [[Template:Image frame]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| align | border | caption | content | dir | innerstyle | link | link_text | max-width | mode | pos | style | width }}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

{{#switch: {{{align|}}} | center | centre =
}}
}}>
{{#ifeq: {{{mode|}}} | scrollable | | style = "width: {{#if: {{{width|}}} | {{#ifeq: {{{border|}}} | no | {{{width}}}px; | {{#expr:{{{width}}}+2}}px; }} | fit-content; }}" }}>{{#ifeq: {{{pos|}}} | top |
{{#if: {{{link|}}} | {{align|right|{{{linkoverride|[[File:Information icon4.svg|16px|link={{{link}}}{{#if: {{{link_text|}}} | {{!}}{{{link_text}}} }}]]}}}}} }}{{{caption|}}}
}}
{{#ifeq: {{#lc:{{{mode|}}}}} | scrollable | {{#ifeq: {{#lc:{{{nowrap|}}}}} | yes |
}} }} {{{content}}} {{#ifeq: {{#lc:{{{mode|}}}}} | scrollable | {{#ifeq: {{#lc:{{{nowrap|}}}}} | yes |
}} }}

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23458359115|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{#switch: {{{align|}}} | center | centre =
}}
}}>
{{#ifeq: {{{mode|}}} | scrollable | | style = "width: {{#if: {{{width|}}} | {{#ifeq: {{{border|}}} | no | {{{width}}}px; | {{#expr:{{{width}}}+2}}px; }} | fit-content; }}" }}>{{#ifeq: {{{pos|}}} | top |

}}
